name: Oriental Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice in warm water for 1-1/2 to 2 hours. Drain well and set aside.
2. Mix the pork with the remaining ingredients (water chestnuts, dried shrimp, green onion, ginger, carrot) in a bowl until well combined.
3. Form the mixture into 14 meatballs by taking a fistful of the mixture and gently squeezing it between your thumb and index finger to form each meatball.
4. Use a wet soup spoon to remove the meatballs from your fist.
5. Roll each meatball in the soaked rice, coating it evenly.
6. Gently press the coated rice onto the meatballs.
7. Steam the meatballs over high heat for 25-30 minutes. Add more water to the steamer if necessary.
8. Serve with soya sauce, if desired. The meatballs can be kept in the refrigerator and reheated later.
